title: Internal Comms
description: Some of the most sensitive and challenging texts are written for your own employees. These include handbooks, codes of conduct, values, policies, and other internal documents that shape how a company works.
They need to be detailed but still engaging. For large companies, they can be just as important as a public-facing mission.
whatYouGet: A set of documents tailored to your needs, along with recommendations for implementation — workshops, quizzes, discussion formats, and other ways to bring the content to life.
